name: vscode-iris-dev
description: Wires iris-dev MCP tools into VS Code Copilot agent mode — automatically picks up your objectscript.conn connection. Requires the iris-dev binary on PATH.

iris-dev.containerName.description: Name of the Docker container running the IRIS instance. Used to provide the IRIS_CONTAINER environment variable to the iris-dev server process, which allows it to use tools which require direct access.

iris-dev.serverPath.description: Full path to the iris-dev binary. Leave empty to auto-discover via PATH. Use this if VS Code cannot find the binary.

iris-dev.nativePort.description: IRIS native superserver port (fallback if not set in objectscript.conn).
